violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of food contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Dishes are being dried on foam matts, surface needs to be non-absorbent and easily cleanable.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Under the dish rack in the breakfast area needs to be cleaned.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. Establishments dish machines were down and they do not have a 3 compartment sink.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Warewash machine was not maintained and/or operated as required. Both dish machines were not operable at the time of inspection.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager is no longer associated with this establishment. The employees certificate displayed is no longer with the establishment.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The dishrack cupboard next to the juice machine needs to be cleaned underneath.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Plates and bowls on the middle table with the cereal bar need to be inverted, and the utensils next to the 3 tub sink need to have the food contact surface facing down.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Plastic wrap on the floor under the prep table along with a box of pan liners.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
